```{r introduction}

# This file only contains the introduction

```

# Introduction

This is a paragraph where we discuss @lonsdorf2019. We can cite the paper in the middle of a sentence, as in the previous sentence. Or we can cite it at the end of a sentence, like in this example [@lonsdorf2019]. When we cite the paper in the manuscript, it will automatically be added to the reference list at the end of the paper.
